priority_actions.description: Complete compliance mappings for 37 critical test cases

IEC_62443.description: Coverage is only 6.0%. Map 79 pending test cases.

NIST_CSF.description: Coverage is only 6.0%. Map 79 pending test cases.

EU_RED.description: Coverage is only 14.3%. Map 12 pending test cases.

EU_CRA_ETSI.description: Coverage is only 6.0%. Map 79 pending test cases.

general_improvements.description: 10 test cases map to multiple frameworks. Use these for efficient multi-compliance testing.
Only 4 test cases cover all frameworks. Identify more universal security requirements.
general_improvements.benefit: Comprehensive security baseline across all regulations
